jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at BigBasket
jsonLd.description:
BigBasket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!
